data.description:
## What
Enrich the performance overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: 8 AI-advantaged concerns (N+1 in loops, unbounded accumulation, blocking ops in async, over-fetch, cache stampede, needless materialization, pool misuse, non-linear complexity on user input). Bright-line reasoning (breaks-under-load / worse-with-scale) recorded as EVIDENCE for Pass-2 to score, not as severity.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-performance.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the performance overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] performance overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: performance overlay enrichment
